name: How Luck
short_description: Welcome to LuckyOne! Here, there is only one rule: be the luckiest of all! Beat the mini-games in record time and take your place at the top of the leaderboard!
detailed_description:
Welcome to LuckyOne! Here, there is only one rule: be the luckiest of all! Beat the mini-games in record time and take your place at the top of the leaderboard!

customize your character, get your chips, and enter the casino to face 5 mini-games based on luck such as :

- LuckySpin
- Bonneteau
- Coin toss
- Dice game
- Video Poker

Face them in the order you want because what ultimately matters is LUCK! Will you manage to beat everyone in the leaderboard thanks to your luck and climb to the top of it?
